FR
	


Work For Us
	
At CMRRA, we share a passion for music and a commitment to supporting the creators behind it. Our team works to ensure music publishers, self-published songwriters, and rights holders are fairly compensated and protected in the complex world of licensing. United by a belief in music’s cultural value, we build innovative systems, advocate for creators, and help shape the future of the industry. Our collaborative and respectful culture is driven by the meaningful impact we make—supporting a vibrant, sustainable music ecosystem in Canada and beyond.
	


Current Job Openings

Nothing found.

Love of Music

A team of passionate, dedicated, hardworking, music industry pros


	
Flexible Work

Convenient downtown location with a hybrid work model and summer hours with a compressed workweek

	
Company Culture

We provide staff with unique opportunities to attend industry and music events, while fostering a culture of respect, open communication, and a sense of belonging

	
Benefits

We offer a comprehensive benefits package with flexible options, health care spending account, and employer-matched retirement plan

Our Commitment

At CMRRA, we’re dedicated to creating a workplace where every team member, client, and partner feels valued and supported. As industry lead
